summary: Large decomp-focused PR for the name-entry menu module, replacing many mnnamenew stubs with typed C implementations for key setup, input, glyph variants, auto-name selection, validation, saving, and menu entry paths. It also propagated stronger types through menu structs and SisLib color handling, and split the mnnamenew data string blob into named symbols. decomp.dev reported +1712 matched bytes, 5 new matches, and 20 mnnamenew improvements.

key_files.role: Core decomp target; expanded from mostly stub markers to concrete name-entry UI logic.
Replaced many UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS declarations with typed prototypes using HSD_GObj, HSD_Archive, NameNewEntry, and GlyphVariantEntry.
Added NameNewEntry and GlyphVariantEntry structs with field offsets and size annotations.
Split former lbl_803EE35C blob into individual mnNameNew_803EE35C..mnNameNew_803EE708 string symbols.
Changed HSD_SisLib_803A74F0 from raw u8* color access to GXColor* field access.
Updated HSD_SisLib_803A74F0 prototype to accept GXColor*.
Added explicit offsets/padding to main menu state structs, including MenuFlow.
Updated name-list color variables and callers to use GXColor instead of s32/u8* casts.
Updated result-screen SisLib color calls to pass GXColor pointers without u8* casts.
Mostly formatting/typing cleanup in a stage file; not central to mnnamenew matching evidence.

what_changed.details: Implemented many previously stubbed functions: mnNameNew_8023B0F8, mnNameNew_8023B314, mnNameNew_KeySetup, mnNameNew_8023BAA8, PickAutoName, NameContainsOnlySpaces, WriteCharactersForNameAtIndex, AddCharacterToName, mnNameNew_GlyphVariantInput, mnNameNew_MainInput, mnNameNew_8023CE4C, fn_8023CFC8, mnNameNew_8023D130, mnNameNew_GlyphVariantSetup, mnNameNew_8023DA08, fn_8023DAEC, fn_8023DBE8, mnNameNew_8023E0D8, InitNameEntryUIState, mnNameNew_8023E32C, and mnNameNew_EnterFromMnCharSel.

Recovered name-entry UI setup and input flow: key grid rendering, language-dependent modes, glyph variant popups, cursor movement, delete/back/cancel, auto-name picking, validation against unique/refused names, writing persistent name data, and transitions back to name/character-select menus.
what_changed.evidence: mnnamenew.c functions reference AutoNamesList, NotAllowedNamesList, lbLang_IsSavedLanguageUS, IsNameUnique, IsNameNotAllowed, CreateNameAtIndex, WriteCharactersForNameAtIndex, mnNameNew_EnterFromMnCharSel.

what_changed.details: Introduced concrete NameNewEntry and GlyphVariantEntry layouts, then used them in mnnamenew.c instead of raw byte offsets.
what_changed.evidence: src/melee/mn/types.h adds structs; mnnamenew.h prototypes use NameNewEntry* and GlyphVariantEntry*.

what_changed.details: Changed HSD_SisLib_803A74F0 to take GXColor* and read r/g/b fields, then updated callers to stop casting color locals to u8*.
what_changed.evidence: sislib.c/.h signature change; gmresult.c and mnname.c call-site updates.

what_changed.details: Renamed/split a single data label at 803EE35C into many mnNameNew string symbols for assertion strings, archive asset names, and language-dependent auto/refuse name tables.
what_changed.evidence: config/GALE01/symbols.txt replaces lbl_803EE35C size 0x3C4 with mnNameNew_803EE35C through mnNameNew_803EE708 data:string symbols.

what_changed.details: decomp.dev reported matched code 61.33% (+0.04%, +1712 bytes), 5 new mnnamenew matches, and 20 improvements in unmatched mnnamenew items.

Several stage, item, fighter, lb, and menu files received include-order, cast-spacing, line-wrapping, or formatting changes; evidence for functional decomp impact outside mnnamenew is weak except for the SisLib color type propagation.
what_changed.evidence: 32 changed files; many small hunks only reformat or remove casts.

smart_moves: Recovered and named UI state structs first, which made a large menu source tractable and allowed mnnamenew.h to replace placeholder prototypes with concrete function signatures.
Propagated the GXColor type into HSD_SisLib_803A74F0 instead of repeatedly casting colors as u8*, improving readability and aligning callers in gmresult and mnname.
Split the .data string blob into individual mnNameNew_* data:string symbols, making archive section names and assertion strings searchable and usable from C.

Kept uncertain address-based names where needed, but used descriptive names when behavior was clear: PickAutoName, NameContainsOnlySpaces, WriteCharactersForNameAtIndex, AddCharacterToName, InitNameEntryUIState, mnNameNew_KeySetup, and mnNameNew_GlyphVariantSetup.
Modeled glyph data as GlyphRow tables and represented variant popup state with GlyphVariantEntry, matching the UI’s lower/upper or language-specific glyph selection behavior.

Used exact HSD object lifecycle patterns: GObj_Create, HSD_JObjLoadJoint, HSD_GObjObject_80390A70, GObj_SetupGXLink, HSD_GObj_SetupProc, GObj_InitUserData, and cleanup of HSD_Text before freeing glyph variant data.
decomp_lessons: For menu/UI modules, recovering user_data layout can unlock many functions at once because jobj arrays, text handles, cursor state, and mode fields are reused across setup, input, rendering, and teardown.

When a library helper actually consumes a structured color, change the API to GXColor* and update all callers; this avoids misleading u8* casts and can simplify matching code that copies colors through stack locals.

Data string blobs should be split into individually named symbols when the C source needs exact archive public names; this PR shows mnNameNew_803EE35C..mnNameNew_803EE708 replacing a single lbl_803EE35C blob.
Language checks are part of matching: lbLang_IsSavedLanguageUS affects initial hovered selection, input mode, and whether mnNameAutoNameUs/mnNameRefuseNameUs or non-US asset names are loaded.

Preserve compiler-shaping artifacts when needed: the diff uses PAD_STACK, FORCE_PAD_STACK, and a dont_inline block around fn_8023DBE8, indicating stack padding/inlining control was part of matching strategy.
For HSD text rendering, keep text allocation/freeing explicit: mnnamenew recreates HSD_Text for key labels, name display, and description text, then frees them in transition/cleanup functions.
Large decomp PRs may include broad formatting churn; future reviewers/searchers should distinguish true type/signature changes from incidental line wrapping in unrelated systems.
naming_conventions: Use module prefix mnNameNew_ for address-named functions and data in src/melee/mn/mnnamenew.c and config/GALE01/symbols.txt.
Use descriptive behavior names when the function’s role is clear, e.g. PickAutoName, NameContainsOnlySpaces, WriteCharactersForNameAtIndex, AddCharacterToName, InitNameEntryUIState.
Name UI user-data structs by screen/component: NameNewEntry for the main name-entry UI and GlyphVariantEntry for the glyph variant popup.
Keep field offsets in shared structs as comments and include explicit padding fields, as done for NameNewEntry, GlyphVariantEntry, MainMenuData, MainMenuPanelData, and MenuFlow.
Use GXColor for RGBA constants and locals rather than s32 or u8 arrays when passing to HSD_SisLib_803A74F0.
Archive public string symbols mirror asset names exactly, e.g. MenMainBack_Top_joint, MenMainConEtNw_Top_animjoint, mnNameAutoNameUs, and mnNameRefuseNameUs.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: PAD_STACK and FORCE_PAD_STACK were used in several mnnamenew functions, indicating stack-shape tuning for matching.
#pragma push / #pragma dont_inline on surrounds fn_8023DBE8, preserving a needed codegen boundary.
The code keeps exact numeric selection IDs such as 0x32..0x39 for special buttons and 0x2D/0x30/0x31 for key/glyph handling rather than prematurely abstracting them into enums.
Glyph table indexing preserves low-level arithmetic such as shifted offsets into mnNameNew_803EDCE4 and mnNameNew_803EE004, plus sentinel loops using mnNameNew_NullCharacter.
JObj traversal is expressed with repeated HSD_JObjGetChild/HSD_JObjGetNext loops over exact child indices, matching the original UI hierarchy instead of introducing higher-level helpers.
Color changes copy GXColor constants through stack locals before calling HSD_SisLib_803A74F0, which likely helps match stack/register behavior.
Object setup uses exact GObj link priorities and proc flags such as GObj_Create(6,7,0x80), GObj_SetupGXLink priority 4/6, and proc->flags_3 = HSD_GObj_804D783C.
review_feedback: No human review comments or reviews were present in the PR slice.
The PR body was sparse: "Tracking PR as usual"; rationale must be inferred from the diff and decomp.dev report.
decomp.dev bot reported 5 new matches: mnNameNew_8023BAA8, fn_8023CFC8, mnNameNew_8023B0F8, mnNameNew_8023B314, and InitNameEntryUIState.

decomp.dev bot reported 20 mnnamenew improvements, including mnNameNew_MainInput, mnNameNew_KeySetup, mnNameNew_GlyphVariantSetup, fn_8023DBE8, mnNameNew_EnterFromMnCharSel, mnNameNew_GlyphVariantInput, PickAutoName, AddCharacterToName, and NameContainsOnlySpaces.
